name: vyapaar-ai
description: Vyapaar AI - Smart Business Digital Assistant. Run 'npm run setup' then 'npm run dev' to start both servers.

scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && cp -n .env.example .env || true && npm run seed && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
